sql_array: CREATE TABLE file_sizes (id UInt32, size UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, size, formatReadableDecimalSize(size) AS readable_size FROM file_sizes;
UPDATE file_sizes SET size = size * 2 WHERE id = 2;
SELECT id, formatReadableDecimalSize(size) AS readable_size FROM file_sizes WHERE size > 1000000;
